title: cynometra mayottensis
intro: Cynometra mayottensis, also known as the Mayotte ironwood or Mayotte chestnut, is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the island of Mayotte in the Comoros archipelago. The medicinal properties of Cynometra mayottensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues and its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide relief from fever and digestive issues, and it can be prepared as a tea or powder for herbal use.
